nanny1.name: Anna Shevchenko

reviews.comment: Anna is wonderful! My kids loved her and she was always punctual.
She's great, but sometimes she had to reschedule on short notice.

nanny1.education: Bachelor's in Early Childhood Education, First Aid Certified
nanny1.about: I love children and have been working with them for over 5 years. I believe in creating a positive and nurturing environment for kids. I also love outdoor activities and crafts.

nanny2.name: Maria Kovalenko

reviews.comment: Maria is very caring and knows how to handle kids very well.
Maria has been a blessing for our family. Our children adore her!

nanny2.education: Master's in Child Psychology, CPR Certified
nanny2.about: I have a passion for teaching and mentoring children. I aim to help them grow and learn in a safe and loving environment. I am also a trained child psychologist, which helps me in understanding and catering to the unique needs of every child.

nanny3.name: Olena Petrenko

reviews.comment: Olena is dependable and has a natural way with children.
My twins love spending time with her. Highly recommend!

nanny3.education: Bachelor's in Child Development, Special Needs Child Care Training
nanny3.about: Being with children brings joy to my day. I've worked with children of various birthday groups, including those with special needs. My approach is hands-on, engaging, and tailored to each child's unique personality.

nanny4.name: Iryna Vasylchenko

reviews.comment: Iryna is fantastic with my toddler. She's always full of creative ideas.
Very professional and genuinely cares for children. My son looks forward to the days she comes over.

nanny4.education: Associate's in Childcare Management, Nutrition for Children Course
nanny4.about: I believe in creating a balanced routine for children, incorporating both learning and play. My background in child nutrition also allows me to ensure kids are eating healthily under my care.

nanny5.name: Kateryna Boyko

reviews.comment: Kateryna is very patient and kind. My daughter loves her storytelling sessions.
She's proactive and always brings fun activities for the kids.

nanny5.education: Bachelor's in Childhood Education, Certified in Children's Yoga
nanny5.about: I integrate mindfulness and yoga into play, making it a unique experience for children. I'm passionate about holistic child development and believe in cultivating both mind and body.

nanny6.name: Valeriia Dybinka

reviews.comment: Valeriia is punctual and always brings educational toys. My son learns a lot when she's around.
She's very gentle with kids and always attentive to their needs.

nanny6.education: Bachelor's in Early Childhood Development, Child Safety Training
nanny6.about: I believe every child is unique and has a distinct learning pace. I focus on individual attention and ensure each child's emotional and educational needs are met.

nanny7.name: Sofiya Ostapenko

reviews.comment: Sofiya has a gentle approach and is fantastic with our toddler. Always attentive.
She has a talent for connecting with children. Our daughter warmed up to her immediately.

nanny7.education: Master's in Child Psychology, Child First Aid Certification
nanny7.about: I integrate play with learning and focus on fostering independence in children. I have a keen understanding of child psychology which helps me tailor my approach to each child's needs.

nanny8.name: Tetyana Horbatenko

reviews.comment: Tetyana is both fun and disciplined. My kids have a great time with her, and they also follow routines well.
She's great with arts and crafts and always has activities planned out.

nanny8.education: Bachelor's in Early Childhood Studies, Certified in Play Therapy
nanny8.about: I'm a firm believer in the power of play for children's development. Whether it's arts and crafts, outdoor games, or reading, I ensure that kids are always engaged and learning.

nanny9.name: Natalia Shevchenko

reviews.comment: Natalia is kind-hearted and always brings a smile to our daughter's face.
She's always punctual and keeps our son engaged with educational games.

nanny9.education: Bachelor's in Childhood Education, Montessori Training Certified
nanny9.about: I'm passionate about the Montessori approach, promoting independence and respect for a child's natural psychological development. I focus on creating a supportive environment for children to explore and learn at their own pace.

nanny10.name: Iryna Holovko

reviews.comment: Iryna is very energetic and always comes up with new games for the kids.
She's been a wonderful addition to our childcare routine. Highly dependable!

nanny10.education: Bachelor's in Primary Education, Child Protection Training
nanny10.about: I believe in a proactive approach to childcare, ensuring that children are engaged in both physical and educational activities. I'm dedicated to providing a safe and stimulating environment for every child.

nanny11.name: Olena Kryvko

reviews.comment: Olena is fantastic with my kids. She's very patient and always brings educational materials.
She's always on time and keeps our son engaged throughout her stay.

nanny11.education: Master's in Educational Science, Certified in Special Needs Education
nanny11.about: My educational background allows me to cater to children with diverse learning needs. I focus on inclusive and engaging activities that promote development and fun.

nanny12.name: Viktoria Tkachenko

reviews.comment: Viktoria is a natural with children. Our daughter warmed up to her immediately.
She's professional, punctual, and very caring. Highly recommend!

nanny12.education: Bachelor's in Child Psychology, First Aid Training
nanny12.about: I combine my background in psychology with practical childcare skills to provide a nurturing environment. I believe in fostering emotional intelligence and creativity in children.

nanny13.name: Svitlana Bondarenko

reviews.comment: Svitlana is very experienced and handle difficult situations with ease.
She's been with our family for years and she's become like a family member.

nanny13.education: Diploma in Childcare and Education, Advanced CPR Certified
nanny13.about: With over a decade in childcare, I've worked with infants to teenagers. I bring a wealth of experience and a calm, structured approach to every household.

nanny14.name: Olena Stepanenko

reviews.comment: Olena is energetic and always brings fun outdoor activities for the kids.
She's fantastic with our twins. Very patient and attentive!

nanny14.education: Bachelor's in Early Childhood Education, Creative Play Specialist Cert
nanny14.about: I specialize in creative play and believe it's essential for children's cognitive and social development. I enjoy bringing arts, music, and outdoor exploration into my care routine.

nanny15.name: Iryna Ponomarenko

reviews.comment: Iryna is very reliable and has a great way with my toddler.
She's always on time and keeps the kids engaged with educational games.

nanny15.education: Bachelor's in Childhood Development, Bilingual Education Specialist
nanny15.about: I incorporate language learning into play, making it a natural and fun experience for children. I'm committed to providing a multilingual and intellectually stimulating environment.

nanny16.name: Yuliia Moroz

reviews.comment: Yuliia is very friendly and my kids look forward to seeing her every time.
She's been a great help to our family. Very caring and trustworthy!

nanny16.education: Bachelor's in Social Work, Child Welfare Training
nanny16.about: My background in social work helps me understand familial dynamics and provide supportive care for children. I focus on creating a stable and loving environment where children can thrive.

nanny17.name: Tetyana Marchenko

reviews.comment: Tetyana is very experienced and handles her responsibilities with great care.
She brings structure and fun into our household. Our children have benefited greatly from her presence.

nanny17.education: Bachelor's in Childcare Management, Advanced Training in Montessori Method
nanny17.about: I combine traditional teaching methods with the Montessori approach, emphasizing independence, respect, and understanding. Each child is unique, and I pride myself on recognizing and nurturing their individual potentials.
